content: There are many recipes out there like this
You can braise it, fry it, there are so many things you can do with tofu
And I used to marinate it in a garlic, ginger and soy sauce base
And pour the sauce over once it got a bit crispy to make the flavors concentrate
oh well here is the recipe I like more
Bcs it also shows the method of putting it into salt water to firm up more

And let it absorb the curry juice
